ContentBlock.title: ContentBlock
ContentBlock.description: Flexible CMS block representing public transparency logs, research, and milestones.

blockType.description: The category of content block, e.g., 'research', 'funding_tracker', 'partner_thanks', 'milestone', 'team', or 'general'

data.description: Type-specific structured fields like goal, raised, authors, year, status, or tag

displayLocations.description: Locations where this block is displayed, e.g. ['homepage', 'build-log', 'research']

CeoTask.title: CeoTask
CeoTask.description: Private, unlisted task item on the CEO's personal checklist.

contentBlocks.description: Public content blocks displayed on homepage, build-log, and research pages.

ceoTasks.description: Private checklist of company tasks managed by the CEO.
